title: POLLYWOG - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING HUB OF LINN, BENTON, AND LINCOLN COUNTIES POLLYWOG Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects families with children to classes, services, and community resources. Expectant parents can register for prenatal classes. Also directs families to parent-child and parenting classes available through local agencies. 6500 Pacific Boulevard SW LM-132 Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Expectant families and families with children ages 0-5 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 917-4884 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 917-4884 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information, staff will respond to information requests submitted through Unite Us or the website within 3 business days FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties Services: General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY LEARNING HUB PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
